title: Handling Uncertainty
description: 今天练习不确定时怎么说.

items.cn: 这个表达适合在工作沟通里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: I'm not sure yet. We can decide after we have more context.
I'm not sure yet. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
I'm not sure yet. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.phrase: It's still up in the air.
items.cn: 这个表达适合在朋友聊天里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: It's still up in the air. We can decide after we have more context.
It's still up in the air. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
It's still up in the air. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: It's still up in the air.
That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.cn: 这个表达适合在工作沟通里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: We'll know more soon. We can decide after we have more context.
We'll know more soon. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
We'll know more soon. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.cn: 这个表达适合在日常交流里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: There are a few unknowns. We can decide after we have more context.
There are a few unknowns. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
There are a few unknowns. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

items.cn: 这个表达适合在工作沟通里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: Let's not overcommit yet. We can decide after we have more context.
Let's not overcommit yet. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
Let's not overcommit yet. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.
